overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dark underground market illuminated by neon signs and holographic displays. The player approaches a food stall, then continues through the corridor past a bar area and holographic entertainment stage.

events.description: slowing down while approaching the food stall with bright neon signage

food stall with circular blue neon sign and red neon figure
cluttered market stalls with various goods and debris

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed market corridor with concrete floors, approaching a food stall marked by bright blue neon signage. Blue-screen monitors line the right side while various market stalls occupy the left.

events.description: stopping at food stall counter to observe vendor

customer in tank top waiting beside the stall

entered.detail: steam rising from cooking equipment with warm yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the food stall counter where a vendor is preparing food under warm lighting. The circular blue neon sign is now directly overhead, and steam rises from the cooking equipment.

events.description: turning around and walking away from food stall
passing illuminated metal stairs with orange neon strips on right

agents.ego_description: turning away from the food stall and walking deeper into the market corridor

red neon sign with witcher text

segments.scene_description: Walking away from the food stall through the corridor, passing an illuminated metal staircase with orange neon lights on the right. The environment remains dark with scattered pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar with green stools and fluorescent lighting

bright green plastic bar stools lined along the counter

segments.scene_description: Passing a bar area illuminated by harsh fluorescent lights with bright green plastic stools. A muscular customer stands up from the counter while another large man in a tank top walks past the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: holographic display stage with industrial machinery

events.description: approaching stage area with large holographic dancer projections

agents.ego_description: approaching a stage area featuring holographic entertainment displays

notable_agents.action: person standing and watching the holographic display

entered.detail: large red holographic figures dancing on elevated platform
large mechanical equipment with steam vents and metal catwalks

segments.scene_description: Approaching an industrial stage area featuring large red holographic dancers projected above the platform. Steam rises from machinery on the right as the camera moves closer to the holographic display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark underground market that shifts from a narrow corridor to a focused interaction at a food stall before returning to the open walkway. It begins by advancing along concrete floors past blue-screen monitors and various stalls, drawing closer to a bright blue neon sign. As the camera reaches the food stall, the perspective halts at the counter where warm lighting illuminates a vendor and rising steam beneath the circular neon glow. The scene then shifts back into motion, moving away from the stall and passing an illuminated metal staircase accented with orange neon lights. Finally, the camera continues through the dim corridor, weaving past scattered pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty underground corridor that shifts from a starkly lit bar area into a vibrant holographic entertainment zone. It begins by passing a bar illuminated by harsh fluorescent lights, where bright green plastic stools line the counter and muscular patrons move across the frame. As the camera advances, the sterile lighting gives way to a more industrial atmosphere characterized by rising steam from machinery on the right. The scene then opens up toward a stage area, where the environment is dominated by the glow of large red holographic dancers projected above the platform. The movement finally culminates as the camera draws closer to the shimmering holographic display.
